description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large, dark-framed windows and several outdoor terraces, including a rooftop area. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall and features a driveway with a car parked in front, as well as a swimming pool and landscaped greenery at the rear. The house includes multiple balconies, shaded outdoor seating areas, and a rooftop deck with furniture. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, outdoor terraces, a driveway, and a pool, enclosed by a low wall. The design features clean lines, white facades, and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, carport, and steps leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, multiple balconies, rooftop terrace, and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, landscaped garden, and open outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible carport, terraces, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a set of steps, a recessed doorway, and a covered carport with minimalistic design elements.
